# Vendored FreeRTOS kernel subset

This directory contains the source/header subset needed by the complex baseline,
copied without functional changes from the official `FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel`
release `V11.3.0`, commit `9b777ae5c5b8e9e456065a00294d1e5f5f9facf5`.

Upstream: <https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel>

The upstream MIT license is retained as `FreeRTOS-Kernel/LICENSE.md`. The local
`FreeRTOSConfig.h` and workload are benchmark-specific and are not upstream files.
